name: rapid-notes
title: Rapid Notes
description: Quickly capture notes: append selected or typed text to a Markdown file as checklist items, or create a new timestamped note from a template.
author: smetdenis

commands.name: append-note
commands.title: Append Rapid Item
commands.description: Append selected or typed text to your Markdown file, with an editable form.

commands.name: append-note-silent
commands.title: Append Rapid Item (Silent)
commands.description: Instantly append the selected text to your Markdown file without a form.

commands.name: new-note
commands.title: New Rapid Note
commands.description: Create a new timestamped Markdown note with frontmatter from a template.

preferences.name: appendTargetFile
preferences.title: Append Rapid Item: Target File
preferences.description: The Markdown file that Append commands write to.

preferences.name: appendHeading
preferences.title: Append Rapid Item: Heading (H1)
preferences.description: If set, append under this H1 heading; leave empty to append to the end of the file.

preferences.name: appendTemplate
preferences.title: Append Rapid Item: Template
preferences.description: Template for each appended line. Values: {content} {url} {title} {app} {page} {date} {time} {datetime}. Formatted (label + newline): {content_f} {url_f} {title_f} {app_f} {page_f}.

preferences.name: newNoteDirectory
preferences.title: New Rapid Note: Directory
preferences.description: Folder where new notes are created.

preferences.name: newNoteBodyTemplate
preferences.title: New Rapid Note: Body Template
preferences.description: Template for the note body; YAML frontmatter is added automatically. Values: {content} {url} {title} {app} {page} {date} {time} {datetime}. Formatted (label + newline): {content_f} {url_f} {title_f} {app_f} {page_f}.

preferences.name: dateFormat
preferences.title: Date Format
preferences.description: date-fns format for {datetime} and the frontmatter created field.

preferences.name: filenameDateFormat
preferences.title: Filename Date Format
preferences.description: date-fns format for new-note filenames. Avoid characters invalid in filenames.

preferences.name: defaultTags
preferences.title: Default Tags
preferences.description: Comma-separated tags prefilled into the New Rapid Note form.

preferences.name: clipboardFallback
preferences.title: Clipboard Fallback
preferences.label: Use the clipboard when no text is selected
preferences.description: When on, the Form commands fall back to the clipboard if nothing is selected — for apps like Telegram that don't expose their selection to a focused form. Copy the text first, then run the command.
